description_long: This is a classic Chesterfield-style sofa upholstered in a deep green, glossy leather material. The sofa features a tufted backrest and inner armrests, with prominent button detailing that adds a luxurious, vintage touch. The armrests are rolled and generously padded, matching the height of the backrest and adorned with a row of metallic nailhead trim for added elegance. Two loose, square cushions are placed on the seat, and the sofa sits on small, dark, rounded legs that are only slightly visible. The overall silhouette is robust and symmetrical, with a solid back and plush, inviting seating area. The finish is smooth and reflective, giving the sofa a polished, high-end appearance suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A deep green, glossy leather Chesterfield sofa with tufted back and arms, rolled armrests, and metallic nailhead trim. Features two loose seat cushions and a plush, symmetrical design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, rolled armrests with nailhead trim, and two loose seat cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the rolled armrest, the thickness of the seat, and the profile of the tufted detailing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back panel and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and seat profile, with visible tufting and cushion depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and a single continuous tufted backrest; cushions are uniform in size and shape.
attribute_armrest_style: Rolled, high armrests matching the backrest height, heavily padded, with metallic nailhead trim along the front edge.
attribute_leg_design: Four small, rounded, dark legs positioned at the corners, mostly recessed and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: High, continuous backrest with deep button tufting, matching the armrest height and forming a unified, plush surface.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid green leather with a glossy finish and deep button tufting on the backrest and arms; no visible fabric pattern, but prominent tufted texture.
